steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to specify the shawl's name in Choctaw. The notes state that the shawl is called anchi in Choctaw. A correct answer must state that Choctaw name explicitly.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The cloth shawl, which is included in the Hina Hanta online archive, is called an anchi in Choctaw.: Directly names the shawl as anchi in Choctaw — exactly what the goal requires. ✓
  • Choice B — Hina Hanta, which means "bright path" in Choctaw, includes a shawl in its archive.: Mentions the shawl but gives no Choctaw name for it. ✗
  • Choice C — The Hina Hanta archive features cultural artifacts, such as a shawl and a fanner basket, that are relevant to the history of the Choctaw people.: Lists the shawl among artifacts but omits its Choctaw name. ✗
  • Choice D — The name of the online archive Hina Hanta means "bright path" in Choctaw.: Gives the Choctaw meaning of the archive's name, not the shawl's name. ✗
That matches Choice A — The cloth shawl, which is included in the Hina Hanta online archive, is called an anchi in Choctaw..
